ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Stock's industry or sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Stock's market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on this date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on this date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on this date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on this date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on this date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on this date */,
  "volume_shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on this date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this technical indicator belongs to */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., 20-day SMA, RSI) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "calculation_period" INTEGER /* Calculation period for the technical indicator */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator value (e.g., absolute, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this moving average belongs to */,
  "ma_type" TEXT /* Type of moving average (e.g., 12-day EWMA, 26-day EWMA) */,
  "ma_value" REAL /* Value of the moving average */,
  "calculation_period" INTEGER /* Calculation period for the moving average */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of the moving average value (e.g., simple, exponential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "obv" (
  "obv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OBV record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this OBV record belongs to */,
  "obv_value" REAL /* OBV value */,
  "calculation_period" INTEGER /* Calculation period for the OBV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obv_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rsi" (
  "rsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSI record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this RSI record belongs to */,
  "rsi_value" REAL /* RSI value */,
  "calculation_period" INTEGER /* Calculation period for the RSI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rsi_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or company of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned to the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was removed from the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this calculation belongs to */,
  "calculation_name" TEXT /* Name of the calculation (e.g., 50-day moving average) */,
  "calculation_value" REAL /* Value of the calculation */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used for the calculation */,
  "inputs" TEXT /* Inputs used for the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
